summary: Plan mode only. Keep #23014 as the open canonical issue for .m2a audio-format support. Route #92167 to central security handling because the job explicitly marks it as a security-signal ref, despite its ordinary media-fix shape. Treat closed linked PR #23260 as historical background only.

actions.reason: #23014 remains the best live non-security canonical issue for the .m2a audio handling request.
The exact item is explicitly marked by the job as a security-signal ref requiring central security handling, so no close, merge, label, comment, or fix action should be planned for it by Clownfish.
Already-closed linked context must not receive a closure action; it is historical evidence for the canonical #23014 issue.
